File: README

Summary: A simple README file containing a 'Hello World!' message, likely serving as a basic introduction or placeholder in a project.

File: src/pipeline/overfit_test.py
Language: python
Summary: This script performs an overfitting test for a machine learning model by training it on a small dataset and checking if it can achieve 100% accuracy. It generates synthetic data, preprocesses it, and trains a FullModel instance with a custom configuration to test its ability to overfit.

File: src/pipeline/overfit_test.py
Function/Class: main
Description: The main function that orchestrates the overfitting test. It loads the configuration, generates synthetic data, preprocesses it, creates a model, and trains it with a custom configuration.
Parameters: None
Returns: None

File: library/src/main/res/values-mdpi/dimens.xml
Language: xml
Summary: This XML file defines dimension values for user interface components in an Android application, specifically for medium-density (mdpi) screens.

File: library/src/main/res/drawable/background_card.xml
Language: xml
Summary: This XML file defines a background shape for a card view, providing a white background with rounded corners.

File: app/.gitignore
Language: None
Summary: This .gitignore file specifies files or directories that Git should ignore in the app directory. Its main purpose is to prevent unnecessary files from being committed to the Git repository, such as build artifacts. By ignoring these files, the repository remains clean and focused on source code.

File: library/src/main/java/com/yalantis/beamazingtoday/ui/adapter/BatAdapter.java
Language: java
Summary: The BatAdapter class is a custom RecyclerView adapter designed to display a list of items with checkboxes and dividers. It handles item clicks, checkbox state changes, and animations for adding, moving, or removing items.

File: library/src/main/java/com/yalantis/beamazingtoday/ui/adapter/BatAdapter.java
Function/Class: BatAdapter
Description: Constructor for the BatAdapter class, initializing the adapter with a list of items and optional listeners for item interactions and animations.
Parameters: goals (List<BatModel>): list of items to display, listener (BatListener): listener for item interactions, animator (BatItemAnimator): animator for item animations
Returns:

File: library/src/main/java/com/yalantis/beamazingtoday/ui/adapter/BatAdapter.java
Function/Class: setRadioButtonColor
Description: Sets the color resource for the radio buttons in the adapter.
Parameters: drawable (int): color resource for the radio buttons
Returns: BatAdapter: the adapter instance for chaining

File: library/src/main/java/com/yalantis/beamazingtoday/ui/adapter/BatAdapter.java
Function/Class: setDividerColor
Description: Sets the color resource for the dividers in the adapter and makes them visible.
Parameters: color (int): color resource for the dividers
Returns: BatAdapter: the adapter instance for chaining

File: library/src/main/java/com/yalantis/beamazingtoday/ui/adapter/BatAdapter.java
Function/Class: setOnOutsideClickListener
Description: Sets a listener for outside clicks on the adapter items.
Parameters: listener (OnOutsideClickedListener): listener for outside clicks
Returns: BatAdapter: the adapter instance for chaining

Parameters: color (int): color resource for the text

Parameters: typeface (Typeface): typeface for the text
Returns: BatAdapter: the adapter instance for chaining

Function/Class: setOnItemClickListener
Description: Sets a listener for item clicks in the adapter.
Parameters: listener (OnItemClickListener): listener for item clicks
Returns: BatAdapter: the adapter instance for chaining

File: library/src/main/res/anim/increasing_anim.xml
Language: xml
Summary: This XML file defines an animation that scales a view from zero size to its original size over a duration of 300 milliseconds, creating an increasing effect.

File: library/src/main/res/layout/bat_add_view.xml
Language: xml
Summary: This XML layout file defines a FrameLayout for displaying two AppCompatImageViews, representing vertical and horizontal cursors, in the center of the view.

File: library/src/main/res/drawable/header_background_rounded.xml
Language: xml
Summary: This XML file defines a rounded rectangle shape used as a background for headers, providing a visually appealing and consistent design element throughout the application.

File: app/src/main/AndroidManifest.xml
Language: xml
Summary: This is the main AndroidManifest.xml file, which serves as the central configuration file for an Android application. It declares the application's components, such as activities, and defines the application's metadata, such as its icon and label.

File: app/src/main/java/com/yalantis/beamazingtoday/sample/Goal.java
Language: java
Summary: This Java class represents a Goal object, implementing the BatModel interface. It provides properties for goal name and checked status, along with getter and setter methods for these properties.

File: app/src/main/java/com/yalantis/beamazingtoday/sample/ExampleActivity.java
Language: java
Summary: This Java file represents an Android activity that demonstrates the usage of a custom recycler view with animation capabilities. It extends AppCompatActivity and implements several listener interfaces to handle user interactions and item manipulation.

File: app/src/main/java/com/yalantis/beamazingtoday/sample/ExampleActivity.java
Function/Class: onCreate
Description: Initializes the activity, sets up the toolbar, and configures the recycler view with a custom adapter and animator.
Parameters: savedInstanceState (Bundle): the saved instance state
Returns: void

File: app/src/main/java/com/yalantis/beamazingtoday/sample/ExampleActivity.java
Function/Class: add
Description: Adds a new item to the beginning of the list and notifies the adapter to animate the addition.
Parameters: string (String): the text to be added
Returns: void

File: app/src/main/java/com/yalantis/beamazingtoday/sample/ExampleActivity.java
Function/Class: delete
Description: Removes an item from the list at the specified position and notifies the adapter to animate the removal.
Parameters: position (int): the position of the item to be removed
Returns: void

File: app/src/main/java/com/yalantis/beamazingtoday/sample/ExampleActivity.java
Function/Class: move
Description: Moves an item from one position to another in the list and notifies the adapter to animate the movement.
Parameters: from (int): the initial position, to (int): the target position
Returns: void

File: app/src/main/java/com/yalantis/beamazingtoday/sample/ExampleActivity.java
Function/Class: onClick
Description: Handles item clicks by displaying a toast message with the item's text.
Parameters: item (BatModel): the clicked item, position (int): the position of the item
Returns: void

File: app/src/main/java/com/yalantis/beamazingtoday/sample/ExampleActivity.java
Function/Class: onOutsideClicked
Description: Reverts the animation when the outside area of the recycler view is clicked.
Parameters: none
Returns: void

File: library/src/main/java/com/yalantis/beamazingtoday/util/AnimationUtil.java
Language: java
Summary: This utility class provides various animation methods for views, including showing, hiding, rotating, scaling, and moving. It simplifies the process of animating views in an Android application.

File: library/src/main/java/com/yalantis/beamazingtoday/util/AnimationUtil.java
Function/Class: show
Description: Makes a view visible by animating its alpha value to 1.
Parameters: view (View): the view to be shown
Returns: void

File: library/src/main/java/com/yalantis/beamazingtoday/util/AnimationUtil.java
Function/Class: hide
Description: Hides a view by animating its alpha value to 0.
Parameters: view (View): the view to be hidden
Returns: void

File: library/src/main/java/com/yalantis/beamazingtoday/util/AnimationUtil.java
Function/Class: rotate
Description: Rotates a view by a specified angle.
Parameters: view (View): the view to be rotated, value (int): the rotation angle, endAction (Runnable): an optional action to be performed after the animation
Returns: void

File: library/src/main/java/com/yalantis/beamazingtoday/util/AnimationUtil.java
Function/Class: showViews
Description: Makes multiple views visible by animating their alpha values to 1.
Parameters: views (View...): the views to be shown
Returns: void

File: library/src/main/java/com/yalantis/beamazingtoday/util/AnimationUtil.java
Function/Class: hideViews
Description: Hides multiple views by animating their alpha values to 0.
Parameters: views (View...): the views to be hidden
Returns: void

File: library/src/main/java/com/yalantis/beamazingtoday/util/AnimationUtil.java
Function/Class: scaleXViews
Description: Scales multiple views horizontally by a specified factor.
Parameters: value (float): the scale factor, views (View...): the views to be scaled
Returns: void

File: library/src/main/java/com/yalantis/beamazingtoday/util/AnimationUtil.java
Function/Class: scaleX
Description: Scales a view horizontally by a specified factor.
Parameters: value (float): the scale factor, view (View): the view to be scaled
Returns: void

File: library/src/main/java/com/yalantis/beamazingtoday/util/AnimationUtil.java
Function/Class: moveX
Description: Moves a view horizontally by a specified distance.
Parameters: view (View): the view to be moved, value (float): the distance to move
Returns: void

File: library/src/main/java/com/yalantis/beamazingtoday/util/AnimationUtil.java
Function/Class: moveX
Description: Moves a view horizontally by a specified distance and performs an action after the animation.
Parameters: view (View): the view to be moved, value (float): the distance to move, endAction (Runnable): the action to be performed after the animation
Returns: void

File: library/src/main/java/com/yalantis/beamazingtoday/util/AnimationUtil.java
Function/Class: animateAlpha
Description: Animates the alpha value of a view to a specified value.
Parameters: view (View): the view to be animated, alpha (float): the target alpha value, endAction (Runnable): an optional action to be performed after the animation
Returns: void

File: library/src/main/java/com/yalantis/beamazingtoday/util/AnimationUtil.java
Function/Class: showKeyboard
Description: Shows the soft keyboard for a view.
Parameters: context (Context): the application context, view (View): the view for which the keyboard should be shown
Returns: void

File: library/src/main/java/com/yalantis/beamazingtoday/Constant.java
Language: java
Summary: This Java class defines a constant for animation duration in milliseconds, providing a reusable value throughout the application.
